heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 558 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums, as may be necessary to carry out the provisions and purposes of this chapter.1So in original. The comma probably should not appear.1
notes: Amendments1992— struck out “not to exceed $500,000 annually,” after “such sums,”.Pub. L. 102–486
amendments: Amendments1992— struck out “not to exceed $500,000 annually,” after “such sums,”.Pub. L. 102–486
